requirement_summary: Candidate move CRUD and selection before commit
Validate legality and reject illegal moves
Persist candidate notes and committed move
Keep draft exploration separate from committed state
Autosave candidate notes during active turn
Ask follow-up when reasoning is too vague
Replay sessions with notes and reflections
Bounded and safe AI output rendering
Challenge mode kill switch via feature flag
Fail-open fallback if AI service unavailable
Historical metric stability across model versions
